meaning: n.枪手,制造枪械者,持枪的歹徒
examples: The gunman, whose mask had slipped, fled.
Police finally managed to overpower the gunman.
Police have issued a description of the gunman.
She said her husband had been killed trying to stop the gunman from shooting other passengers.
As dawn approached and coalition helicopters began to circle overhead, the gunman sought cover.
